revision.comment: 新規カテゴリ
revision.text:
[[日本]]の[[水道橋]]に関するカテゴリ。
*「水管橋」や「水路橋」と呼ばれているものを含む。
[[Category:水道橋|にほん]] [[Category:日本の橋|すいとうはし]] [[Category:日本の水道施設|はし]]

revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[ja:Category:日本の水道橋]]

Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:"
Text replacement - "{{wikidata link|" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|"
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]]"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[Japan]]の[[水道橋]]に関するカテゴリ。
*「水管橋」や「水路橋」と呼ばれているものを含む。 {{座標一覧}} ==Local Content== {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|ja|Category:日本の水道橋|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{translated page|ja|Category:日本の水道橋|version=91008068}}
[[Ja:Category:日本の水道橋]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Shinkamiya Bridge]] {{Wikidata link|Q9672383}} [[Category:categories missing wikidata]]
[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] [[Category:Categories in Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] [[Category:Aqueducts (bridges)]] [[Category:Bridges in Japan]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories to be renamed]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Water supply infrastructure in Japan]] [[Category:Categories]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
